candidates.title: M. Antoninus Imperator Ad Se Ipsum
candidates.quality_notes: Scholarly critical edition from Perseus Digital Library. TEI-encoded with CTS URN references. Well-structured with explicit book.chapter.section divisions. Book 1 contains 17 sections (chapters), each with section subdivisions.
candidates.confidence_notes: High quality: Perseus/OGL source, scholarly edition, machine-readable TEI format, explicit structural markup
candidates.structural_usefulness: excellent - book/chapter/section hierarchy explicit in XML
candidates.ranking_rationale: Best available source: scholarly edition, open license, CTS-compatible, excellent XML structure, Perseus provenance
